revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「<div class="pathnavbox"> * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の政治 (都道府県別)|富山県の政治|富山県の官公庁}} * {{Pathnav…」
revision.text:
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の政治 (都道府県別)|富山県の政治|富山県の官公庁}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|富山県の行政}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|行政機関|各国の行政機関|日本の行政機関|日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)}}
{{Template:Category:日本の都道府県/下位|富山県|[[行政機関]]|行政機関|行政|きようせいきかん}} [[Category:富山県の官公庁|きようせいきかん]] [[Category:日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)|とやまけん]]

revision.comment: [[Special:Diff/85363522#pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行|Bot作業依頼]]: [[MediaWiki‐ノート:Common.css#特定テンプレート用のCSSをTemplateStylesに移行する提案（8回目）|pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行]] (insource:/class=[" ]*pathnavbox/) - [[User:Cewbot/log/20190913|log]]
Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:富山県の行政機関]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:富山県副知事]].

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Merge [[Category:富山県の官公庁]] into [[Category:Government Offices in Toyama Prefecture]] via bot
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Merge [[Category:富山県の行政]] into [[Category:Administration of Toyama Prefecture]] via bot
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "Category:日本の都道府県" to "Category:Prefectures of Japan"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Copying from [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] to [[Category:11]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:11]] (crud category cleanup)
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: tag with [[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]] (has ja: interwiki, no Wikidata)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Pathnavbox|
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の政治 (都道府県別)|富山県の政治|富山県の官公庁}}
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|富山県の行政}}
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|行政機関|各国の行政機関|日本の行政機関|日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)}}
}}
{{Template:Category:Prefectures of Japan/下位|富山県|[[行政機関]]|行政機関|行政|きようせいきかん}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:富山県の行政機関|comment=category history here}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:富山県の行政機関|version=85406993}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[ja:Category:富山県の行政機関]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:富山県副知事]]
[[Category:Categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]
[[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
[[Category:Administration of Toyama Prefecture]]
[[Category:Administrative Agencies of Japan by Prefecture]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Government Offices in Toyama Prefecture]]
[[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]
[[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]]
[[Category:Tier 2 Categories]]
[[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Administrative_Agencies_in_Toyama_Prefecture here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Administrative_Agencies_in_Toyama_Prefecture for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->

<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. {{Pathnavbox|
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の政治 (都道府県別)|富山県の政治|富山県の官公庁}}
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|富山県の行政}}
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|行政機関|各国の行政機関|日本の行政機関|日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)}}
}}
